title: Data race: lichen_iface written and read without synchronization
close_reason: Fixed: Documented write-once-read-many synchronization pattern for lichen_iface pointer. The pointer is set exactly once during initialization (before callback registration) and never modified. Added comprehensive comment explaining why mutex-free reads are safe: (1) callback registration happens after write establishing happens-before, (2) single-core Cortex-M provides natural store ordering, (3) atomic iface_init_failed check provides additional ordering on error paths.
